  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

ABS X24 Bosch8.1 V2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 740
Recv ID: 760
Baudrate: 250000
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "037",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 20684,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Alimentation": "0"
    },
    "name": "Alimentation calculateur"

    },
    "name": "Réseau CAN"
  },
  {

    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Capteur vitesse roue AvG"
  },
  {

    },

  },

    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3

        "firstbyte": 11,

        "firstbyte": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,

        "firstbyte": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 10
      },

        "firstbyte": 3
      },

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Etat ASR (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Etat MSR (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 14
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 1

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 14,
        "bitoffset": 2
      }
    }

        "bitoffset": 1

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Admission avant gauche": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },

        "firstbyte": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Echappement arrière gauche": {
        "firstbyte": 4,

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },

        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Valve USV2 (TCS)": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "Valve ASV1 (used for filling)": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "Valve ASV2 (TCS)": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "Choix valeur ouverture valves admission": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Choix valeur ouverture valves echappement": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Choix valeur ouverture valves USV": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Choix valeur ouverture valves ASV": {
        "firstbyte": 12
      }
    },

      "Etat du processus d'activation": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
